data.title: VICI Properties Inc. raises quarterly dividend to $0.45 per share, a 4.0% increase, payable October 9, 2025.
data.description: In New York, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per common stock share for July 1, 2025, to September 30, 2025. This equates to an annualized $1.80 per share and a 4.0% rise from the existing rate. The payout date is October 9, 2025, for shareholders on record by the end of business on September 18, 2025.

data.title: CrowdStrike named leader in MDR in Europe by Forrester Wave, tops in Strategy and Current Offering.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) has been recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Managed Detection And Response Services In Europe, Q3 2025. Ranking highest among vendors assessed in the Strategy and Current Offering segments, CrowdStrike received top scores in essential criteria such as endpoint detection surface, cloud detection surface, identity detection surface, managed response (manual and automated), threat hunting, and analysis.

data.title: Branded Legacy, Inc. acquires GMP facility in Vancouver to bolster research and manufacturing for combating opioid crisis.
data.description: BioLegacy is being supported to spearhead advancements in addressing the opioid crisis through cutting-edge manufacturing and research methods. This initiative aims to leverage technology in producing innovative solutions to combat opioid misuse and addiction. The project involves a significant investment of over $10 million to accelerate the development of new treatments and interventions. By empowering BioLegacy, the goal is to drive progress in finding effective strategies to tackle the opioid epidemic through a combination of state-of-the-art manufacturing processes and extensive research efforts.

data.title: Tesla stock rises, Robotaxi app opens to public, ride-hailing service expanding soon. Bulls eye aggressive entry.
data.description: Tesla's stock is on the rise, approaching a key entry point. The Tesla Robotaxi app is set to be launched to the public, offering a ride-hailing service that will soon be more widely available. Investors are showing optimism as they anticipate the potential growth in this venture.
